# TronRelic

> TronRelic is an open-source TRON blockchain analytics platform: live energy
> rental pricing compared across marketplaces, real-time whale and transaction
> monitoring, USDT transfer-cost context, and community tools. Pricing data is
> normalized against live chain parameters (energy-per-TRX, regeneration), so
> cross-market comparisons stay accurate as network conditions change.

Key facts: TRON transactions consume energy instead of gas fees. Energy can be
staked or rented from markets for 1 hour to 30 days; rented energy regenerates
every 24 hours, so multi-day rentals deliver their quota each day. TronRelic
tracks these markets and the chain parameters that price them.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://tronrelic.com/): Live transaction feed and platform overview
- [Resource Markets](https://tronrelic.com/resource-markets): Live TRON energy rental pricing compared across marketplaces
- [Articles](https://tronrelic.com/articles): Guides and analysis on TRON energy, fees, and markets
- [Tools](https://tronrelic.com/tools): Calculators and utilities for TRON energy and fees
- [Forum](https://tronrelic.com/forum): Community discussion
- [About](https://tronrelic.com/about): What TronRelic is and how pricing normalization works

## Index

- [Sitemap](https://tronrelic.com/sitemap.xml): Full public URL index, refreshed continuously

## Policy

AI crawlers are welcome on all public content. Do not crawl /system or /api.
